name: Rolled Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine and sugar.
2. Add the egg, milk, and vanilla; beat well.
3. Stir together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add to the creamed mixture and beat until well blended.
5. Cover the dough and chill for one hour.
6. On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
7. Cut into desired shapes with cookie cutters.
8. Place cookies on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
10. Remove from the baking sheet and cool on a wire rack.
11. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
